🎶

Audio Converter

Convert audio files between MP3, WAV, OGG, FLAC, and AAC using pydub + FFmpeg.

🚀 API-powered Media Tools media audio convert mp3
🔧
PHASE 4 — BACKEND COMING SOON
This tool uses our Python / FastAPI backend hosted on Render. Full functionality will be live once the backend deploys. The upload UI below shows the final intended experience.
🎶
Drop your file here or browse
Max 50 MB  ·  Free & secure
.mp3 .wav .ogg
Uploading… 0%
How it works
01
Upload your file using the drop zone or file picker.
02
Our FastAPI backend on Render processes it using FFmpeg, pydub.
03
The processed file is returned and downloaded automatically to your device.
04
Files are deleted from the server immediately after download. Your data stays private.
Technical details
Endpoint    : /api/media/audio-convert
Method     : POST
Accepts    : audio/mpeg · audio/wav · audio/ogg
Returns    : audio/*
Backend    : Python · FastAPI · Render
Category   : Media Tools
Tags       : media, audio, convert, mp3, wav, ogg
REST API Reference

Base URL: https://toolforge-api.onrender.com

POST /api/media/audio-convert 
curl -X POST \
  https://toolforge-api.onrender.com/api/media/audio-convert \
  -F "file=@your_file.mp3" \
  --output result.audio
Response
Content-Type: audio/*
Body: binary file stream (download directly)

On error:
{"detail": "error message", "status": 4xx}
